testimonials.text: After years of chronic back pain, Dr. Liang's acupuncture treatments finally gave me my life back. Her gentle approach and deep understanding of how the body works as a whole system made all the difference.

The herbal formulas Dr. Liang created for my hormonal imbalances worked better than anything I'd tried before. She takes time to really understand what your body needs and adjusts treatment as you heal.
I was skeptical about cupping therapy, but it provided incredible relief for my shoulder tension. Dr. Liang explains everything clearly and makes you feel completely comfortable throughout treatment.
Dr. Liang's holistic approach helped me through a difficult fertility journey with both acupuncture and emotional support. Her warmth and expertise gave me hope when I needed it most.
The combination of treatments and lifestyle guidance I received transformed my overall energy and well-being. This is healthcare that actually addresses the whole person, not just symptoms.
